summary: VenuLoQ iteration 90 - Venue DETAIL page hero image swipe bug fix verification. All features PASSED. The native addEventListener with { passive: false } fix on VenuePublicPage.js heroImgRef is working correctly.

issues: PostHog analytics throws 'Cannot destructure property clientX' error when touch events are dispatched - third-party issue, not blocking functionality

venue_detail_hero_swipe_left.details: Swipe left on hero image changes src from photo-1746044159277 to photo-1746044159252 (next image)

venue_detail_hero_swipe_right.details: Swipe right returns to previous image successfully

venue_detail_dot_indicators.details: 5 dot indicators present at bottom of hero gallery, show '5 photos' count

venue_detail_no_vertical_scroll_block.details: Horizontal swipe does NOT block vertical page scroll - scroll position stayed at 0 after swipe

venue_detail_lightbox.details: Clicking hero image opens PhotoLightbox showing '1 / 5' counter with thumbnails

venue_detail_back_button.details: Back button (data-testid='venue-back-btn') visible and functional at top-left

venue_detail_share_button.details: Share button (data-testid='share-btn') visible and clickable at top-right

login_flow.details: Login with democustomer@venulock.in / password123 successful - redirected to /my-enquiries with 'Welcome back!' toast

multiple_images_via_swipe.details: 4 consecutive left swipes accessed 5 different images (initial + 4 new), confirming full gallery navigation

bug_fix_verification.issue: Photos on venue DETAIL page hero gallery were not swipable on mobile - only had hover-based arrows (invisible on mobile) and tiny dots
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added native addEventListener with { passive: false } on heroImgRef in VenuePublicPage.js lines 162-188

implementation_details.touchmove: Detects horizontal swipe (dx > 8 && dx > dy), calls preventDefault() to avoid scroll
implementation_details.touchend: If diff > 25px: swipe left = setActiveImg(i+1), swipe right = setActiveImg(i-1)

bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - Touch swipe now works on venue detail page hero image, preventDefault() properly blocks vertical scroll during horizontal swipe

critical_code_review_comments: heroImgRef correctly attached to image container div at line ~257 with ref={heroImgRef}
Native touch listeners use { passive: false } for touchmove to allow preventDefault()
Swipe threshold of 25px and dx > dy check prevents accidental swipes
Separate useEffect clamps activeImg to valid range when images change
context_for_next_testing_agent: Venue DETAIL page hero image swipe verified working (VenuePublicPage.js heroImgRef). Test at mobile viewport 390x844 on /venues/{city}/{slug} pages. Use TouchEvent dispatch: touchstart → touchmove (>25px horizontal diff) → touchend. Check img src changes. PostHog 'clientX' error on touch events is third-party analytics issue, not blocking. Previous iteration 89 verified search page card swipe (MobileVenueCard.js, MobileQuickPreview.js).
